SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2002 - CONTINUED TO JAN-29-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525 BY STIPULATION
NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILITY OF COUNSEL FILED BY ATTY FOR PLAINTIFF MERRIAM BALDOMERO

JUDGE JOHN E. MUNTER, CLERK NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER RHONDA AQUILINA. MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2003 - SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL ON JAN-29-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 606.
